meaning: n.美国印第安部族,[美俚]傻瓜,易受骗者
examples: I am flat snail, but am not flathead.
That flathead delivered the wrong box!
On Thursday was the big fishing trip on Flathead Lake.
We only need to remove the top cover, so just remove the six long, silver, flathead screws that are size T12.
Currently on the menu is a charcoal oven cooked flathead fish.
